# Setup: The Platform-Specific Zone

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 3. macOS / Linux /
     WSL2 parallel tracks; shells, package managers; zsh-vs-bash;
     Apple Silicon /opt/homebrew/bin PATH note; PowerShell sidebar.
     + Supply-chain safety (verify installers, checksums, PATH-hijack).
     Drafted in Phase 3. -->
